description: CompositionGrey polo t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed tipped collar and velvetty in-seam, buttoned rugged chest placket, short sleeves with ribbed tipped hems, vented hems and printed seal on left chestFittingComfortWash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees Use mild detergent Do not tumble dry Do not wring Do not bleach Do not scrub Do not dry clean Do not dry in direct sunlight Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Bold and stylish, this grey polo neck t-shirt from the united colors of benetton speaks volumes of your sense of heightened style. The printed seal badge on the left chest is a tribute to the Brands longevity. The ribbed sleeve hems contour your well-toned arms perfectly, while the vented hem offers a comfortable Fit. Team this with jeans and lifestyle sportswear for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
